---
title: "Figures_2026_V3"
author: "Kesondra"
date: "2026-03-10"
output: 
  pdf_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

packages <- c(
  "dplyr", "tidyr", "ggplot2", "ggdist",
  "lubridate", "reshape2", "naniar", "BBmisc",
  "ggrepel", "gghighlight", "ggtext",
  "gridExtra", "multcomp", "multcompView",
  "readr", "stringr", "tinytex", "knitr"
)

to_install <- packages[!packages %in% installed.packages()[, "Package"]]

if (length(to_install) > 0) {
  install.packages(to_install)
}

invisible(lapply(packages, library, character.only = TRUE))

# Libraries
library(dplyr); library(tidyr); library(ggplot2); library(ggdist)
library(lubridate); library(reshape2); library(naniar); library(BBmisc)
library(ggrepel); library(gghighlight); library(ggtext)
library(gridExtra); library(grid); library(multcomp); library(multcompView)
library(readr); library(stringr); library(tinytex); library(knitr)

daily_path <- "E:/Github/diurnal-divergence-factor/data/Masterfile.csv"


Daily <- readr::read_csv(daily_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

# Basic hygiene (only type + factor levels; no value edits)
Daily <- Daily %>%
  mutate(
    Date = as.Date(Date),
    Drought = factor(
      dplyr::coalesce(Drought, ifelse(!is.na(Cluster) & Cluster > 0, "Drought", "ND")),
      levels = c("ND","Drought")
    ),
    drought_cat = factor(dplyr::coalesce(drought_cat, "ND"),
                         levels = c("ND","LS","MS")),
    AI_cat = factor(AI_cat,
                    levels = c("Humid","Semi-Arid","Arid"),
                    ordered = TRUE),
    Veg = factor(Veg, levels = c("DBF","ENF","SHR","GRA"))
  )

# Map p-values to stars
p_to_stars <- function(p) {
  if (is.na(p)) return("ns")
  if (p < 0.001) return("***")
  if (p < 0.01)  return("**")
  if (p < 0.05)  return("*")
  "ns"
}

# Tukey letters (for 3+ groups) per data.frame
tukey_letters <- function(dat, x, y) {
  dat <- dat[!is.na(dat[[x]]) & !is.na(dat[[y]]), , drop = FALSE]
  # group info
  g    <- factor(dat[[x]])
  levs <- levels(g)
  k    <- nlevels(g)

  make_tbl <- function(names_vec, labs_vec) {
    tibble::tibble(!!rlang::sym(x) := names_vec, .label = labs_vec)
  }

  if (k < 1) {
    return(make_tbl(character(0), character(0)))
  }
  if (k == 1) {
    return(make_tbl(levs, NA_character_))
  }
  if (k == 2) {
    p <- tryCatch(stats::t.test(dat[[y]] ~ g)$p.value, error = function(e) NA_real_)
    labs <- if (is.na(p) || p >= 0.05) c("a","a") else c("a","b")
    names(labs) <- levs
    return(make_tbl(names(labs), unname(labs)))
  }

  a  <- stats::aov(stats::as.formula(paste(y, "~", x)), data = dat)
  hs <- tryCatch(stats::TukeyHSD(a)[[1]][, "p adj"], error = function(e) NULL)

  if (is.null(hs)) {
    labs_full <- setNames(rep("a", k), levs)
  } else {
    tuk <- multcompView::multcompLetters(hs)$Letters   # named char vector
    labs_full <- setNames(rep("a", k), levs)
    common <- intersect(names(tuk), names(labs_full))
    labs_full[common] <- tuk[common]
  }

  make_tbl(names(labs_full), unname(labs_full))
}

theme_ddf_facet <- theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.4, color = "grey90"),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.3, color = "grey95"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

# Figure output dir
output_dir <- "E:/Github/diurnal-divergence-factor/plots"

```

## Figure x. Relative ET VPD plot
```{r Fig2_RelativeETVPDplot, fig.cap= "Figure x. The ET-VPD relationship is illustrated above, where maximum ET (blue) and maximum VPD (red) has been converted to relative values from 0 to 1 throughout the course of the day and averaged for their respective periods. On the left is a non-drought period (May 5-June 30, 2016), where typical coupling of ET and VPD can be seen. On the right is a drought period (May 5-June 30, 2013), where the timing of ET and VPD become decoupled. Data for these plots are sourced from a woody savanna eddy covariance site in Arizona (US-SRS)"}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,      # Hide code
  warning = FALSE,   # Hide warnings
  message = FALSE    # Optional: hide package loading messages
)
# US-SRS (Arid&Hyperarid  WOO) -  Cluster #9 (LS)
#Drought of interest:  US-SRS    
#Drought May 5 to June 30 2013
#ND Year: 2016\
SRSfile <- read.csv("//ewa-fluxfp1/fluxtower/Ameriflux_Data/Update_08_2025/Step4_Fluxnet_Data/Step2_output_Fluxnet_w_P_Daymet/US-SRS.csv")

#Variables of interest:
SRSfile$datetime <- SRSfile$DateTime
SRSfile$LE <- SRSfile$LE_f
SRSfile$NETRAD <- SRSfile$NETRAD
SRSfile$VPD_PI <- SRSfile$VPD_f

SRSDR <- SRSfile %>%
  dplyr::filter(datetime >= "2013-05-05 00:00:00" & datetime < "2013-06-30 00:00:00")%>%
  mutate(yday = yday(datetime)) %>%
  #mutate(hour = hour(datetime)) %>%
  dplyr::select(datetime, Hour, yday, LE, NETRAD, VPD_PI) %>%
  replace_with_na_all(condition = ~.x == -9999) %>%
  dplyr::rename("ET" = LE) %>%
  dplyr::rename("Q" = NETRAD) %>%
  dplyr::rename("D" = VPD_PI) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Hour > 7 & Hour < 19) %>%
  group_by(Hour) %>%
  summarise_if(is.numeric, mean, na.rm = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(ET = normalize(ET, method = "range", range = c(0, 1))) %>%
  mutate(Q = normalize(Q, method = "range", range = c(0, 1))) %>%
  mutate(D = normalize(D, method = "range", range = c(0, 1))) %>%
  dplyr::select(-Q) %>%
  melt(., id.vars = c("yday", "Hour")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Hour, y = value, group = variable, colour = variable)) +
  geom_smooth(size = 2, span = 0.4, se = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#42B2EB", "#EB7B42")) +
  xlab("Hour") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(8, 12, 16), labels = c("8 AM", "12 PM", "4 PM")) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 1), labels = c("0", "1")) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(y = "<span style='font-size:14pt;font-weight:bold;color:black'>Relative </span><span style='font-size:14pt;font-weight:bold;color:#42B2EB'>ET</span><span style='font-size:14pt;font-weight:bold;color:black'> and </span><span style='font-size:14pt;font-weight:bold;color:#EB7B42'>VPD</span>",
       y.subtitle = "Relative",
       title = "US-SRS LS Drought \n9/22/2019 to 10/5/2019") +
  theme(axis.title.y = element_markdown(),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "none",
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) +
  geom_vline(data = . %>% filter(variable == "ET") %>% slice(which.max(value)),
             aes(xintercept = Hour), linetype = "dashed", color = "#42B2EB", size = 1) +
  geom_vline(data = . %>% filter(variable == "D") %>% slice(which.max(value)),
             aes(xintercept = Hour), linetype = "dashed", color = "#EB7B42", size = 1)


#ND Years of interest: 2002, 2013, 2016, 2017, 2020, 2021
SRSGR <- SRSfile %>%
  dplyr::filter(datetime >= "2016-05-05 00:00:00" & datetime < "2016-06-30 00:00:00")%>%
  mutate(yday = yday(datetime)) %>%
  #mutate(hour = hour(datetime)) %>%
  dplyr::select(datetime, Hour, yday, LE, NETRAD, VPD_PI) %>%
  replace_with_na_all(condition = ~.x == -9999) %>%
  dplyr::rename("ET" = LE) %>%
  dplyr::rename("Q" = NETRAD) %>%
  dplyr::rename("D" = VPD_PI) %>%
  dplyr::filter(Hour > 7 & Hour < 19) %>%
  group_by(Hour) %>%
  summarise_if(is.numeric, mean, na.rm = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(ET = normalize(ET, method = "range", range = c(0, 1))) %>%
  mutate(Q = normalize(Q, method = "range", range = c(0, 1))) %>%
  mutate(D = normalize(D, method = "range", range = c(0, 1))) %>%
  dplyr::select(-Q) %>%
  melt(., id.vars = c("yday", "Hour")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Hour, y = value, group = variable, colour = variable)) +
  geom_smooth(size = 2, span = 0.4, se = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#42B2EB", "#EB7B42")) +
  xlab("Hour") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(8, 12, 16), labels = c("8 AM", "12 PM", "4 PM")) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 1), labels = c("0", "1")) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(y = "<span style='font-size:14pt;font-weight:bold;color:black'>Relative </span><span style='font-size:14pt;font-weight:bold;color:#42B2EB'>ET</span><span style='font-size:14pt;font-weight:bold;color:black'> and </span><span style='font-size:14pt;font-weight:bold;color:#EB7B42'>VPD</span>",
       y.subtitle = "Relative",
       title = "US-MOZ ND Year\n9/22/2010 to 10/5/2010") +
  theme(axis.title.y = element_markdown(),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "none",
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) +
  geom_vline(data = . %>% filter(variable == "ET") %>% slice(which.max(value)),
             aes(xintercept = Hour), linetype = "dashed", color = "#42B2EB", size = 1) +
  geom_vline(data = . %>% filter(variable == "D") %>% slice(which.max(value)),
             aes(xintercept = Hour), linetype = "dashed", color = "#EB7B42", size = 1)



plot1 <- SRSDR #Drought
plot2 <- SRSGR #Non-Drought


# Create titles for each plot
title1 <- "Drought Period\n5/5/2013 to 6/30/2013"
title2 <- "Non-Drought Year\n5/5/2016 to 6/30/2016"
overall_title <- "Site: US-SRS"

# Define the theme with bold and centered titles
title_theme <- theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))

# Arrange the plots side by side
grid.arrange(
  plot2 + ggtitle(title2) + title_theme, 
  plot1 + ggtitle(title1) + title_theme,
  nrow = 1,
  top = textGrob(overall_title, gp = gpar(fontsize = 16, fontface = "bold"))
)

#Save
output_path <- file.path(output_dir, "US-SRS_Drought_vs_NonDrought.png")

# Open a PNG device
ggsave(output_path, width = 7, height = 4, dpi = 300, bg = "white", units = "in", 
       plot = grid.arrange(
         plot2 + ggtitle(title2) + title_theme, 
         plot1 + ggtitle(title1) + title_theme,
         nrow = 1,
         top = textGrob(overall_title, gp = gpar(fontsize = 16, fontface = "bold"))
       ))
```

## Figure x. Drought versus ND
```{r Figx_Drought_Plot, fig.cap= "Figure x. Comparison of daily diurnal DDF during drought (red) and non-drought (cyan) periods for 58 pooled flux tower sites during the growing season (May 1st to October 31st), covering x to y. Half-eye densities show Gaussian kernel density estimates using an unbounded KDE (bandwidth = 0.40). Boxplots summarize the median and interquartile range, and white points indicate means; outlier points are not displayed. The gray dashed reference line indicates the median DDF for the non-drought (ND) group."}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,      # Hide code
  warning = FALSE,   # Hide warnings
  message = FALSE    # Optional: hide package loading messages
)
# Drought vs Non-Drought
df <- Daily %>% filter(!is.na(Drought), !is.na(DDF)) %>%
  mutate(Drought = factor(Drought, levels = c("ND","Drought"))) %>%
  mutate(
    # explicit x positions so ND can be offset cleanly
    x_pos = as.numeric(Drought) + dplyr::case_when(
      Drought == "ND"      ~ -0.2,
      Drought == "Drought" ~  0.0
    )
  )

bw_use <- 0.40
dens   <- ggdist::density_unbounded(bandwidth = bw_use)

# ND median reference line (computed from what you plot)
nd_line <- df %>%
  filter(Drought == "ND") %>%
  summarise(nd_med = median(DDF, na.rm = TRUE))

# t-test + stars
ttest <- tryCatch(stats::t.test(DDF ~ Drought, data = df),
                  error = function(e) list(p.value = NA_real_))

sig_label <- dplyr::case_when(
  ttest$p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
  ttest$p.value < 0.01  ~ "**",
  ttest$p.value < 0.05  ~ "*",
  TRUE                  ~ "ns"
)

# star position (give headroom)
y_max <- max(df$DDF, na.rm = TRUE)
span  <- diff(range(df$DDF, na.rm = TRUE))
y_star <- y_max + 0.08 * span

# put star between the two groups (midpoint of their x_pos)
x_star <- mean(c(0.8, 2.0))  # (1-0.2) and (2+0.0) = 0.8 and 2.0

droughtplot <- ggplot(df, aes(x = x_pos, y = DDF, fill = Drought, group = Drought)) +

  # ND median line (appears vertical after coord_flip)
  ggplot2::geom_hline(
    data = nd_line,
    aes(yintercept = nd_med),
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "gray30",
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +

  ggdist::stat_halfeye(
    data = ~subset(.x, Drought == "ND"),
    density = dens, .width = 0, alpha = 0.5,
    slab_color = "#17BEBB", slab_linewidth = 1.1
  ) +
  ggdist::stat_halfeye(
    data = ~subset(.x, Drought == "Drought"),
    density = dens, .width = 0, alpha = 0.5,
    slab_color = "#E4572E", slab_linewidth = 1.1
  ) +

  geom_boxplot(width = 0.35, linewidth = 0.8, color = "black", outlier.shape = NA) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point",
               shape = 21, size = 2, color = "black", fill = "white", stroke = 0.8) +

  # headroom for star + avoid clipping after flip
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(-10, 10, by = 2)#,
    #expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.20))
  ) +

  coord_flip(clip = "off") +
  theme_ddf_facet +
  #theme(plot.margin = margin(5.5, 3.5, 5.5, 5.5)) +

  # align tick labels with the actual centers (ND is shifted left)
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(0.8, 2.0),
    labels = c("ND","Drought")
  ) +

  scale_fill_manual(values = c("ND" = "#17BEBB", "Drought" = "#E4572E")) +

  labs(
    #title = "DDF by Drought Category",
    y = "DDF (hours)", 
    x = "",
   # caption = paste0("Half-eye: unbounded Gaussian KDE (bw = ", bw_use, "). White dot: mean")
  ) +

  annotate("text", x = x_star, y = y_star, label = sig_label,
           color = "black", size = 7, fontface = "bold")

print(droughtplot)

ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "DroughtvsND.png"),
       droughtplot, width = 8, height = 2.5, dpi = 300, bg = "white", units = "in")
```

\newpage
## Figure x. Drought Severity
```{r Figx_DroughtSeverityPlots, fig.cap = "Figure X. Distribution of daily diurnal decoupling factor (DDF; hours) across non-drought (ND; blue), less-severe drought (LS; yellow), and more-severe drought (MS; red) days pooled across 58 flux tower sites for the growing season (May 1–October 31; x–y). Half-eye densities show Gaussian kernel density estimates (unbounded KDE; bandwidth = 0.40). Boxplots summarize the median and interquartile range, with white points indicating means; outlier points are not displayed. The gray dashed reference line indicates the ND median DDF. Letters refer to Tukey post hoc test; groups sharing a letter are not significantly different (α = 0.05)."}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,      # Hide code
  warning = FALSE,   # Hide warnings
  message = FALSE    # Optional: hide package loading messages
)
Daily$drought_cat <- factor(Daily$drought_cat, levels = c("ND","LS","MS"))
dat3 <- Daily %>% filter(!is.na(drought_cat), !is.na(DDF))

bw_use <- 0.40
dens   <- ggdist::density_unbounded(bandwidth = bw_use)

# explicit x positions (so everything aligns)
dat3 <- dat3 %>%
  mutate(
    x_pos = as.numeric(drought_cat) + dplyr::case_when(
      drought_cat == "ND" ~ 0.0,
      drought_cat == "LS" ~ 0.2,
      drought_cat == "MS" ~ 0.4
    )
  )

# ND median reference line
nd_line <- dat3 %>%
  filter(drought_cat == "ND") %>%
  summarise(nd_med = median(DDF, na.rm = TRUE))

# Tukey letters + label positions (aligned to x_pos)
letters_df <- tukey_letters(dat3, x = "drought_cat", y = "DDF")

y_tops <- dat3 %>%
  group_by(drought_cat) %>%
  summarise(y_top = max(DDF, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

span <- diff(range(dat3$DDF, na.rm = TRUE))

lvl <- c("ND","LS","MS")
offs <- c("ND" = 0.0, "LS" = 0.2, "MS" = 0.4)

lvl <- c("ND","LS","MS")
offs <- c("ND" = 0.0, "LS" = 0.2, "MS" = 0.4)

letters_plot <- y_tops %>%
  mutate(drought_cat = as.character(drought_cat)) %>%
  left_join(
    letters_df %>% mutate(drought_cat = as.character(drought_cat)),
    by = "drought_cat"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    idx   = as.numeric(factor(drought_cat, levels = lvl)),
    x_pos = idx + offs[drought_cat],
    y_lab = y_top + 0.06 * span
  )


droughtcats <- ggplot(dat3, aes(x = x_pos, y = DDF, fill = drought_cat, group = drought_cat)) +

  # ND median line (will appear vertical after coord_flip)
  ggplot2::geom_hline(
    data = nd_line,
    aes(yintercept = nd_med),
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "gray30",
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +

  ggdist::stat_halfeye(
    data = ~subset(.x, drought_cat == "ND"),
    density = dens, .width = 0, alpha = 0.5,
    slab_color = "#56B4E9", slab_linewidth = 1.1
  ) +
  ggdist::stat_halfeye(
    data = ~subset(.x, drought_cat == "LS"),
    density = dens, .width = 0, alpha = 0.5,
    slab_color = "#E69F00", slab_linewidth = 1.1
  ) +
  ggdist::stat_halfeye(
    data = ~subset(.x, drought_cat == "MS"),
    density = dens, .width = 0, alpha = 0.5,
    slab_color = "#D55E00", slab_linewidth = 1.1
  ) +

  geom_boxplot(width = 0.35, linewidth = 0.8, color = "black", outlier.shape = NA) +

  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point",
               shape = 21, size = 2, color = "black", fill = "white", stroke = 0.8) +

  # headroom for Tukey letters + avoid clipping after flip
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(-10, 10, by = 2)#,
    #expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.20))
  ) +

  coord_flip(clip = "off") +
  theme_ddf_facet +

  # align category labels to nudged centers
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(1.0, 2.2, 3.4),
    labels = c("ND","LS","MS")
  ) +

  scale_fill_manual(values = c("ND"="#56B4E9","LS"="#E69F00","MS"="#D55E00")) +

  labs(
   # title = "DDF by Drought Severity",
    y = "Daily DDF (hours)", x = "",
    #caption = paste0("Half-eye: unbounded Gaussian KDE (bw = ", bw_use, "). White dot: mean")
  ) +
  

  geom_text(
    data = letters_plot,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    aes(x = x_pos, y = y_lab, label = .label),
    fontface = "bold", size = 5, color = "black"
  )

print(droughtcats)

ggsave(file.path(output_dir,"DroughtSev.png"),
       droughtcats, width=8, height=3.5, dpi=300, bg="white", units="in")

```

\newpage
## Vegetation plots
```{r Figx_VegDroughtSev,  fig.cap= "Figure x. Comparison of DDF during drought and non-drought periods for 58 pooled flux tower sites during the growing season (May 1st to October 31st) categorized by Vegetation IGBP type. Vegetation types are as follows: grasslands (GRA), deciduous broadleaf forests (DBF), evergreen needleleaf forests (ENF), mixed forests (MF), closed shrublands (CSH), open shrublands (OSH), savannas (SAV), and woody savannas (WSA). Each boxplot illustrates the distribution of DDF values for non-drought (ND; cyan) and less severe drought (LS; yellow), and more severe drought (MS; red) periods. The dotted horizontal line at zero indicates a DDF where the timing of maximum ET and VPD are the same. The black horizontal line within each boxplot indicates the median DDF value. Statistical outliers not shown."}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,      # Hide code
  warning = FALSE,   # Hide warnings
  message = FALSE    # Optional: hide package loading messages
)


bw_use <- 0.40
dens   <- ggdist::density_unbounded(bandwidth = bw_use)

veg_df <- Daily %>%
  filter(!is.na(Veg), !is.na(Drought), !is.na(DDF)) %>%
  mutate(
    Drought = factor(Drought, levels = c("ND","Drought")),
    Veg     = factor(Veg, levels = c("DBF","ENF","GRA","SHR")),
    x_pos   = as.numeric(Drought) + dplyr::case_when(
      Drought == "ND"      ~ -0.2,
      Drought == "Drought" ~  0.0
    )
  )

# stars per facet + y position (use span so it’s robust)
sig_veg <- veg_df %>%
  group_by(Veg) %>%
  summarise(
    p = tryCatch(t.test(DDF ~ Drought)$p.value, error = function(e) NA_real_),
    y_max = max(DDF, na.rm = TRUE),
    span  = diff(range(DDF, na.rm = TRUE)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    star  = vapply(p, p_to_stars, character(1)),
    y_bar = y_max + 0.08 * span,
    x_bar = mean(c(0.8, 2.0))  # midpoint of shifted centers
  )

# ND median line per facet (Veg)
nd_line_veg <- veg_df %>%
  filter(Drought == "ND") %>%
  group_by(Veg) %>%
  summarise(nd_med = median(DDF, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

VegDroughtPlot <- ggplot(veg_df, aes(x = x_pos, y = DDF, fill = Drought, group = Drought)) +

  # ND median reference line (appears vertical after coord_flip)
  ggplot2::geom_hline(
    data = nd_line_veg,
    aes(yintercept = nd_med),
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "gray30",
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +

  ggdist::stat_halfeye(
    data = ~subset(.x, Drought == "ND"),
    density = dens, .width = 0, alpha = 0.5,
    slab_color = "#17BEBB", slab_linewidth = 1.1
  ) +
  ggdist::stat_halfeye(
    data = ~subset(.x, Drought == "Drought"),
    density = dens, .width = 0, alpha = 0.5,
    slab_color = "#E4572E", slab_linewidth = 1.1
  ) +

  geom_boxplot(width = 0.35, linewidth = 0.8, color = "black", outlier.shape = NA) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point",
               shape = 21, size = 2, color = "black", fill = "white", stroke = 0.8) +

  # headroom for stars in each facet
  scale_y_continuous(
  breaks = seq(-10, 10, by = 2)#,
  #expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.20))
)+

  #scale_y_continuous(expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.20)

  coord_flip(clip = "off") +
  theme_ddf_facet +
  #theme(plot.margin = margin(5.5, 3.5, 5.5, 5.5)) +

  # Align tick labels with shifted centers
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(0.8, 2.0),
    labels = c("ND","Drought")
  ) +

  facet_wrap(~Veg, ncol = 2, nrow = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("ND" = "#17BEBB", "Drought" = "#E4572E")) +

  labs(
   # title = "DDF by Drought Category and Vegetation",
    y = "Daily DDF (hours)", x = "",
    #caption = paste0("Half-eye: unbounded Gaussian KDE (bw = ", bw_use, "). White dot: mean")
  ) +

  # Stars (per facet; won’t clip)
  geom_text(
    data = sig_veg,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    aes(x = x_bar, y = y_bar, label = star),
    fontface = "bold", size = 5
  )

print(VegDroughtPlot)

ggsave(file.path(output_dir,"Veg_Drought.png"),
       VegDroughtPlot, width=10, height=6, dpi=300, bg="white", units="in")

```


```{r Figx_VegDrought, fig.cap= "Figure x. "}
# ---- data ----
v3 <- Daily %>%
  filter(!is.na(Veg), !is.na(drought_cat), !is.na(DDF)) %>%
  mutate(
    drought_cat = factor(drought_cat, levels = c("ND","LS","MS")),
    Veg = factor(Veg, levels = c("DBF","ENF","GRA","SHR")),
    x_pos = as.numeric(drought_cat) + dplyr::case_when(
      drought_cat == "ND" ~ 0.0,
      drought_cat == "LS" ~ 0.2,
      drought_cat == "MS" ~ 0.4
    )
  )

# ND median per Veg facet
nd_line_vegsev <- v3 %>%
  filter(drought_cat == "ND") %>%
  group_by(Veg) %>%
  summarise(nd_med = median(DDF, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Tukey letters + positions per Veg facet (aligned to x_pos)
letters_by_veg <- v3 %>%
  group_by(Veg) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    labs <- tukey_letters(.x, x = "drought_cat", y = "DDF")
    y_top <- .x %>%
      group_by(drought_cat) %>%
      summarise(y_top = max(DDF, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

    span <- diff(range(.x$DDF, na.rm = TRUE))

    dplyr::left_join(labs, y_top, by = "drought_cat") %>%
      mutate(
        y_lab = y_top + 0.06 * span,
        x_pos = as.numeric(factor(drought_cat, levels = c("ND","LS","MS"))) +
          dplyr::case_when(
            drought_cat == "ND" ~ 0.0,
            drought_cat == "LS" ~ 0.2,
            drought_cat == "MS" ~ 0.4
          )
      )
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

VegSevCats <- ggplot(v3, aes(x = x_pos, y = DDF, fill = drought_cat, group = drought_cat)) +

  # ND median reference line (appears vertical after coord_flip)
  ggplot2::geom_hline(
    data = nd_line_vegsev,
    aes(yintercept = nd_med),
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "gray30",
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +

  # Half-eyes (shared KDE)
  ggdist::stat_halfeye(
    data = ~subset(.x, drought_cat == "ND"),
    density = dens, .width = 0, alpha = 0.5,
    slab_color = "#56B4E9", slab_linewidth = 1.1
  ) +
  ggdist::stat_halfeye(
    data = ~subset(.x, drought_cat == "LS"),
    density = dens, .width = 0, alpha = 0.5,
    slab_color = "#E69F00", slab_linewidth = 1.1
  ) +
  ggdist::stat_halfeye(
    data = ~subset(.x, drought_cat == "MS"),
    density = dens, .width = 0, alpha = 0.5,
    slab_color = "#D55E00", slab_linewidth = 1.1
  ) +

  # Boxplots + means
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.35, linewidth = 0.8, color = "black", outlier.shape = NA) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point",
               shape = 21, size = 2, color = "black", fill = "white", stroke = 0.8) +

  # headroom for letters + prevent clipping after flip
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(-10, 10, by = 2)#,
    #expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.20)))+
  #scale_y_continuous(expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.20)
  ) +

  coord_flip(clip = "off") +
  theme_ddf_facet +
  #theme(plot.margin = margin(5.5, 3.5, 5.5, 5.5)) +

  # Align axis labels to nudged centers
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(1.0, 2.2, 3.4),
    labels = c("ND","LS","MS")
  ) +

  scale_fill_manual(values = c("ND"="#56B4E9","LS"="#E69F00","MS"="#D55E00")) +
  facet_wrap(~Veg, ncol = 2, nrow = 3) +

  labs(
    #title = "DDF by Drought Severity and Vegetation",
    y = "Daily DDF (hours)", x = "",
    #caption = paste0("Half-eye: unbounded Gaussian KDE (bw = ", bw_use, "). White dot: mean")
  ) +

  # Tukey letters (aligned!)
  geom_text(
    data = letters_by_veg,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    aes(x = x_pos, y = y_lab, label = .label),
    fontface = "bold", size = 4
  )

print(VegSevCats)
ggsave(file.path(output_dir,"Veg_DroughtSev.png"),
       VegSevCats, width=10, height=8, dpi=300, bg="white", units="in")


```



```{r Figx_Veg_only, fig.cap= "Figure x. "}
pal_ai <- c(
  "DBF" = "#753bbd",
  "ENF" = "#2F80ED",
  "GRA" = "#2dc84d", 
  "SHR" = "#ff7f41"
)



bw_use <- 0.4
dens   <- ggdist::density_unbounded(bandwidth = bw_use)

lvl = c("DBF", "ENF", "GRA", "SHR")
offs <- c(DBF = 0.0, ENF = 0.2, GRA = 0.4, SHR = 0.6)

dat3 <- Daily %>%
  filter(!is.na(Veg), !is.na(DDF)) %>%
  mutate(
    Veg = factor(Veg, levels = lvl),
    idx   = as.numeric(Veg),
    x_pos = idx + offs[as.character(Veg)]
  )

# Tukey letters + positions aligned to x_pos
letters_df <- tukey_letters(dat3, x = "Veg", y = "DDF")

y_tops <- dat3 %>%
  group_by(Veg) %>%
  summarise(y_top = max(DDF, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

span <- diff(range(dat3$DDF, na.rm = TRUE))

letters_plot <- y_tops %>%
  mutate(Veg = as.character(Veg)) %>%
  left_join(letters_df %>% mutate(Veg = as.character(Veg)), by = "Veg") %>%
  mutate(
    idx   = as.numeric(factor(Veg, levels = lvl)),
    x_pos = idx + offs[Veg],
    y_lab = y_top + 0.06 * span
  )

veg_plot <- ggplot(dat3, aes(x = x_pos, y = DDF, fill = Veg, group = Veg)) +
  ggdist::stat_halfeye(
    data = ~subset(.x, Veg == "DBF"),
    density = dens, .width = 0, alpha = 0.35,   # <- lighter density
    slab_color = pal_ai["DBF"], slab_linewidth = 1.1
  ) +
  ggdist::stat_halfeye(
    data = ~subset(.x, Veg == "ENF"),
    density = dens, .width = 0, alpha = 0.35,
    slab_color = pal_ai["ENF"], slab_linewidth = 1.1
  ) +

  ggdist::stat_halfeye(
    data = ~subset(.x, Veg == "GRA"),
    density = dens, .width = 0, alpha = 0.35,   # <- lighter density
    slab_color = pal_ai["GRA"], slab_linewidth = 1.1
  ) +
  ggdist::stat_halfeye(
    data = ~subset(.x, Veg == "SHR"),
    density = dens, .width = 0, alpha = 0.35,
    slab_color = pal_ai["SHR"], slab_linewidth = 1.1
  ) +

  
  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.35, linewidth = 0.8, color = "black", outlier.shape = NA,
    alpha = 0.90                                  # <- stronger box color
  ) +
  
  stat_summary(
    fun = mean, geom = "point",
    shape = 21, size = 2.2,
    color = "black", fill = "white",
    stroke = 1.1                                  # <- thicker outline
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-10, 10, by = 2)) +
  coord_flip(clip = "off") +
  theme_ddf_facet +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(1.0, 2.2, 3.4,4.6),
    labels = c("DBF", "ENF", "GRA", "SHR")        # <- display label fix
  ) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = pal_ai,
    breaks = lvl#,
    #labels = c(Humid="Humid", SemiArid="Semi-Arid", Arid="Arid")  # <- legend label fix
  ) +
  
  labs(
   # title = "DDF by Veg",
    y = "Daily DDF (hours)", x = "",
    #caption = paste0("Half-eye: unbounded Gaussian KDE (bw = ", bw_use, "). White dot: mean"),
    #fill = NULL
  ) +
  
  geom_text(
    data = letters_plot,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    aes(x = x_pos, y = y_lab, label = .label),
    fontface = "bold", size = 5
  )

print(veg_plot)

ggsave(
  file.path(output_dir, "Veg_only.png"),
  veg_plot, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300, bg = "white", units = "in"
)


```

\newpage
## AI cats


```{r Figx_AI_only, fig.cap= "Figure x. "}
pal_ai <- c(
  "Arid" = "#E4572E",
  "Humid" = "#17BEBB"
)


bw_use <- 0.4
dens   <- ggdist::density_unbounded(bandwidth = bw_use)

lvl  <- c("Humid","Arid")
offs <- c(Humid = 0.0, Arid = 0.4)

dat3 <- Daily %>%
  filter(!is.na(AI_cat), !is.na(DDF)) %>%
  mutate(
    AI_cat = factor(AI_cat, levels = lvl),
    idx   = as.numeric(AI_cat),
    x_pos = idx + offs[as.character(AI_cat)]
  )



# one overall Arid vs Humid test
p_ai <- tryCatch(
  t.test(DDF ~ AI_cat, data = dat3)$p.value,
  error = function(e) NA_real_
)

sig_AI_cat <- dat3 %>%
  summarise(
    y_max = max(DDF, na.rm = TRUE),
    y_min = min(DDF, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    span = y_max - y_min,
    star = p_to_stars(p_ai),
    y_bar = y_max + 0.08 * span,
    x_bar = mean(c(1.0, 2.4))
  )



ai_plot <- ggplot(dat3, aes(x = x_pos, y = DDF, fill = AI_cat, group = AI_cat)) +
  
  ggdist::stat_halfeye(
    data = ~subset(.x, AI_cat == "Humid"),
    density = dens, .width = 0, alpha = 0.35,   # <- lighter density
    slab_color = pal_ai["Humid"], slab_linewidth = 1.1
  ) +
  
  ggdist::stat_halfeye(
    data = ~subset(.x, AI_cat == "Arid"),
    density = dens, .width = 0, alpha = 0.35,
    slab_color = pal_ai["Arid"], slab_linewidth = 1.1
  ) +
  
  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.35, linewidth = 0.8, color = "black", outlier.shape = NA,
    alpha = 0.90                                  # <- stronger box color
  ) +
  
  stat_summary(
    fun = mean, geom = "point",
    shape = 21, size = 2.2,
    color = "black", fill = "white",
    stroke = 1.1                                  # <- thicker outline
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-10, 10, by = 2)) +
  coord_flip(clip = "off") +
  theme_ddf_facet +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(1.0, 2.2),
    labels = c("Humid","Arid")        # <- display label fix
  ) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = pal_ai,
    breaks = lvl,
    labels = c(Humid="Humid", Arid="Arid")  # <- legend label fix
  ) +
  
  labs(
    #title = "DDF by Aridity",
    y = "Daily DDF (hours)", x = "",
    #caption = paste0("Half-eye: unbounded Gaussian KDE (bw = ", bw_use, "). White dot: mean"),
    #fill = NULL
  ) +
  
    geom_text(
    data = sig_AI_cat,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    aes(x = x_bar, y = y_bar, label = star),
    fontface = "bold", size = 5
  )
  
  # geom_text(
  #   data = letters_plot,
  #   inherit.aes = FALSE,
  #   aes(x = x_pos, y = y_lab, label = .label),
  #   fontface = "bold", size = 5
  # )

print(ai_plot)

ggsave(
  file.path(output_dir, "AIcat_only.png"),
  ai_plot, width = 8, height = 3.5, dpi = 300, bg = "white", units = "in"
)


```

```{r Figx_AI_Drought,  fig.cap= "Figure x. AI_cat"}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,      # Hide code
  warning = FALSE,   # Hide warnings
  message = FALSE    # Optional: hide package loading messages
)

# ---- data ----
AI_cat_df <- Daily %>%
  filter(!is.na(AI_cat), !is.na(Drought), !is.na(DDF)) %>%
  mutate(
    Drought = factor(Drought, levels = c("ND","Drought")),
    AI_cat  = factor(AI_cat, levels = c("Arid", "Semi-Arid", "Humid")),
    x_pos   = as.numeric(Drought) + dplyr::case_when(
      Drought == "ND"      ~ -0.2,
      Drought == "Drought" ~  0.0
    )
  )

bw_use <- 0.4
dens   <- ggdist::density_unbounded(bandwidth = bw_use)

# stars per facet + robust y position
sig_AI_cat <- AI_cat_df %>%
  group_by(AI_cat) %>%
  summarise(
    p = tryCatch(t.test(DDF ~ Drought)$p.value, error = function(e) NA_real_),
    y_max = max(DDF, na.rm = TRUE),
    span  = diff(range(DDF, na.rm = TRUE)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    star  = vapply(p, p_to_stars, character(1)),
    y_bar = y_max + 0.08 * span,
    x_bar = mean(c(0.8, 2.0))  # midpoint of shifted centers
  )

# ND median line per facet (AI_cat)
nd_line_ai <- AI_cat_df %>%
  filter(Drought == "ND") %>%
  group_by(AI_cat) %>%
  summarise(nd_med = median(DDF, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

AI_catDroughtPlot <- ggplot(AI_cat_df, aes(x = x_pos, y = DDF, fill = Drought, group = Drought)) +

  # ND median reference line (appears vertical after coord_flip)
  ggplot2::geom_hline(
    data = nd_line_ai,
    aes(yintercept = nd_med),
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "gray30",
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +

  ggdist::stat_halfeye(
    data = ~subset(.x, Drought == "ND"),
    density = dens, .width = 0, alpha = 0.5,
    slab_color = "#17BEBB", slab_linewidth = 1.1
  ) +
  ggdist::stat_halfeye(
    data = ~subset(.x, Drought == "Drought"),
    density = dens, .width = 0, alpha = 0.5,
    slab_color = "#E4572E", slab_linewidth = 1.1
  ) +

  geom_boxplot(width = 0.35, linewidth = 0.8, color = "black", outlier.shape = NA) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point",
               shape = 21, size = 2, color = "black", fill = "white", stroke = 0.8) +

  # headroom for stars
  #scale_y_continuous(expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.20))) +
    scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(-10, 10, by = 2)#,
    #expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.20)
    )+

  coord_flip(clip = "off") +
  theme_ddf_facet +
  #theme(plot.margin = margin(5.5, 3.5, 5.5, 5.5)) +

  # Align tick labels with shifted centers
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(0.8, 2.0),
    labels = c("ND","Drought")
  ) +

  scale_fill_manual(values = c("ND" = "#17BEBB", "Drought" = "#E4572E")) +
  facet_wrap(~AI_cat, nrow = 3, ncol = 1) +

  labs(
    #title = "DDF by Drought Category and Aridity",
    y = "Daily DDF (hours)", x = "",
    #caption = paste0("Half-eye: unbounded Gaussian KDE (bw = ", bw_use, "). White dot: mean")
  ) +

  geom_text(
    data = sig_AI_cat,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    aes(x = x_bar, y = y_bar, label = star),
    fontface = "bold", size = 7
  )

print(AI_catDroughtPlot)

ggsave(file.path(output_dir,"AIcat_Drought_vs_ND.png"),
       AI_catDroughtPlot, width=8, height=6, dpi=300, bg="white", units="in")

```

```{r Figx_AI_DroughtSev, fig.cap= "Figure x. "}

bw_use <- 0.4
dens   <- ggdist::density_unbounded(bandwidth = bw_use)

v3 <- Daily %>%
  filter(!is.na(AI_cat), !is.na(drought_cat), !is.na(DDF)) %>%
  mutate(
    drought_cat = factor(drought_cat, levels = c("ND","LS","MS")),
    AI_cat      = factor(AI_cat, levels = c("Arid", "Semi-Arid", "Humid")),
    x_pos = as.numeric(drought_cat) + dplyr::case_when(
      drought_cat == "ND" ~ 0.0,
      drought_cat == "LS" ~ 0.2,
      drought_cat == "MS" ~ 0.4
    )
  )

# ND median line per AI_cat facet (use v3, not ai_df)
nd_line_ai <- v3 %>%
  filter(drought_cat == "ND") %>%
  group_by(AI_cat) %>%
  summarise(nd_med = median(DDF, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Tukey letters + positions (add x_pos + keep y_lab tighter)
letters_by_AI_cat <- v3 %>%
  group_by(AI_cat) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    labs <- tukey_letters(.x, x = "drought_cat", y = "DDF")
    y_top <- .x %>%
      group_by(drought_cat) %>%
      summarise(y_top = max(DDF, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
    
    span <- diff(range(.x$DDF, na.rm = TRUE))
    
    dplyr::left_join(labs, y_top, by = "drought_cat") %>%
      mutate(
        # smaller offset so it stays inside the panel more often
        y_lab = y_top + 0.06 * span,
        x_pos = as.numeric(factor(drought_cat, levels = c("ND","LS","MS"))) +
          dplyr::case_when(
            drought_cat == "ND" ~ 0.0,
            drought_cat == "LS" ~ 0.2,
            drought_cat == "MS" ~ 0.4
          )
      )
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

AI_catSevCats <- ggplot(v3, aes(x = x_pos, y = DDF, fill = drought_cat, group = drought_cat)) +
  
  # ND median reference line (use ggplot2 namespace to avoid masking)
  ggplot2::geom_hline(
    data = nd_line_ai,
    aes(yintercept = nd_med),
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "gray30",
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  
  ggdist::stat_halfeye(
    data = ~subset(.x, drought_cat == "ND"),
    density = dens, .width = 0, alpha = 0.5,
    slab_color = "#56B4E9", slab_linewidth = 1.1
  ) +
  ggdist::stat_halfeye(
    data = ~subset(.x, drought_cat == "LS"),
    density = dens, .width = 0, alpha = 0.5,
    slab_color = "#E69F00", slab_linewidth = 1.1
  ) +
  ggdist::stat_halfeye(
    data = ~subset(.x, drought_cat == "MS"),
    density = dens, .width = 0, alpha = 0.5,
    slab_color = "#D55E00", slab_linewidth = 1.1
  ) +
  
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.35, linewidth = 0.8, color = "black", outlier.shape = NA) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point",
               shape = 21, size = 2, color = "black", fill = "white", stroke = 0.8) +
  
  # IMPORTANT: give DDF axis extra headroom so letters aren’t clipped after flip
  #scale_y_continuous(expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.20))) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(-10, 10, by = 2)#,
    #expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.20)
    )+
  
  coord_flip(clip = "off") +
  theme_ddf_facet +
  #theme(plot.margin = margin(5.5, 3.5, 5.5, 5.5)) +  # right margin helps after flip
  
  # Align the categorical axis labels WITH the nudged centers
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(1.0, 2.2, 3.4),
    labels = c("ND","LS","MS")
  ) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("ND"="#56B4E9","LS"="#E69F00","MS"="#D55E00")) +
  facet_wrap(~AI_cat, nrow = 3, ncol = 1) +
  
  labs(
   # title = "DDF by Drought Severity and Aridity",
    y = "Daily DDF (hours)", x = "",
    #caption = paste0("Half-eye: unbounded Gaussian KDE (bw = ", bw_use, "). White dot: mean")
  ) +
  
  geom_text(
    data = letters_by_AI_cat,
    aes(x = x_pos, y = y_lab, label = .label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    fontface = "bold", size = 5
  )

print(AI_catSevCats)

ggsave(file.path(output_dir,"AIcat_DroughtSev.png"),
       AI_catSevCats, width=8, height=8, dpi=300, bg="white", units="in")

```

\newpage
## DDF difference BarPlots

```{r Barplots_Veg_AI, fig.cap= "Figure Delta DDF by Veg and sitename."}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,      # Hide code
  warning = FALSE,   # Hide warnings
  message = FALSE    # Optional: hide package loading messages
)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpattern)

theme_ddf_facet <- theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.4, color = "grey90"),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.3, color = "grey95"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

# 1) Prep
df <- Daily %>%
  filter(!is.na(Drought), !is.na(DDF), !is.na(AI_cat), !is.na(Veg), !is.na(mean_AI)) %>%
  mutate(
    Drought = factor(Drought, levels = c("ND", "Drought")),
    Veg     = factor(Veg, levels = c("DBF", "ENF", "GRA", "SHR")),
    AI_cat  = factor(AI_cat, levels = c("Arid", "Humid"))
  )

# 2) One veg / AI_cat / mean_AI per site
site_veg <- df %>%
  count(sitename, Veg, name = "n") %>%
  arrange(sitename, desc(n)) %>%
  group_by(sitename) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(sitename, Veg)

site_ai <- df %>%
  count(sitename, AI_cat, name = "n") %>%
  arrange(sitename, desc(n)) %>%
  group_by(sitename) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(sitename, AI_cat)

site_mean_ai <- df %>%
  group_by(sitename) %>%
  summarise(mean_AI = mean(mean_AI, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# 3) Mean DDF per site × class, then delta
delta_site <- df %>%
  group_by(sitename, Drought) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_DDF = mean(DDF, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_days   = n(),
    .groups  = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Drought,
    values_from = c(mean_DDF, n_days)
  ) %>%
  mutate(delta_DDF = mean_DDF_Drought - mean_DDF_ND) %>%
  left_join(site_veg, by = "sitename") %>%
  left_join(site_ai, by = "sitename") %>%
  left_join(site_mean_ai, by = "sitename") %>%
  filter(!is.na(delta_DDF), !is.na(Veg), !is.na(AI_cat), !is.na(mean_AI)) %>%
  #arrange(Veg, mean_AI) %>%
  arrange(delta_DDF) %>%
  mutate(
    site_order = row_number(),
    sitename = factor(sitename, levels = sitename)
  )

veg_cols <- c(
  "DBF" = "#753bbd",
  "ENF" = "#2F80ED",
  "GRA" = "#2dc84d",
  "SHR" = "#ff7f41"
)

p1 <- ggplot(
  delta_site,
  aes(x = site_order, y = delta_DDF, fill = Veg, pattern = AI_cat)
) +
  geom_hline(
    yintercept = c(-1, -0.5, 0.5, 1),
    linewidth = 0.6,
    color = "gray50",
    linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.8, color = "gray30") +
  ggpattern::geom_col_pattern(
    width = 0.85,
    color = "black",
    pattern_fill = "black",
    pattern_colour = "black",
    pattern_angle = 45,
    pattern_density = 0.25,
    pattern_spacing = 0.02,
    pattern_key_scale_factor = 0.6
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = veg_cols) +
  scale_pattern_manual(values = c("Arid" = "none", "Humid" = "stripe")) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = delta_site$site_order,
    labels = delta_site$sitename,
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.03))
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(-1.2, 1.2),
    breaks = seq(-1, 1, 0.5)
  ) +
  theme_ddf_facet +
  theme(
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1, size = 10, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(face = "bold", color = "black", size = 11),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(20, 10, 10, 10)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "ΔDDF (hours)"
  )

print(p1)

ggsave(
  file.path(output_dir, "BarPlots_DeltaDDF_by_Veg_and_AI_cat.png"),
  p1,
  width = 12,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white",
  units = "in",
  device = ragg::agg_png
)

```

```{r Barplots_Veg_AI_LS, fig.cap= "Figure Delta DDF by Veg and sitename."}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,      # Hide code
  warning = FALSE,   # Hide warnings
  message = FALSE    # Optional: hide package loading messages
)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpattern)

theme_ddf_facet <- theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.4, color = "grey90"),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.3, color = "grey95"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

# 1) Prep
df_ls <- Daily %>%
  filter(!is.na(drought_cat), !is.na(DDF), !is.na(AI_cat), !is.na(Veg)) %>%
  filter(drought_cat %in% c("ND", "LS")) %>%
  mutate(
    drought_cat = factor(drought_cat, levels = c("ND", "LS")),
    Veg     = factor(Veg, levels = c("DBF", "ENF", "GRA", "SHR")),
    AI_cat  = factor(AI_cat, levels = c("Arid", "Humid"))
  )

# 2) One veg / AI_cat per site
site_veg <- df_ls %>%
  count(sitename, Veg, name = "n") %>%
  arrange(sitename, desc(n)) %>%
  group_by(sitename) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(sitename, Veg)

site_ai <- df_ls %>%
  count(sitename, AI_cat, name = "n") %>%
  arrange(sitename, desc(n)) %>%
  group_by(sitename) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(sitename, AI_cat)

# 3) Mean DDF per site × class, then delta
delta_site <- df_ls %>%
  group_by(sitename) %>%
  filter(all(c("ND", "LS") %in% drought_cat)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(sitename, drought_cat) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_DDF = mean(DDF, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_days   = n(),
    .groups  = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = drought_cat,
    values_from = c(mean_DDF, n_days)
  ) %>%
  mutate(delta_DDF = mean_DDF_LS - mean_DDF_ND) %>%
  left_join(site_veg, by = "sitename") %>%
  left_join(site_ai, by = "sitename") %>%
  filter(!is.na(delta_DDF), !is.na(Veg), !is.na(AI_cat)) %>%
  arrange(delta_DDF) %>%
  mutate(
    site_order = row_number(),
    sitename = factor(sitename, levels = sitename)
  )

veg_cols <- c(
  "DBF" = "#753bbd",
  "ENF" = "#2F80ED",
  "GRA" = "#2dc84d",
  "SHR" = "#ff7f41"
)

p_ls <- ggplot(
  delta_site,
  aes(x = site_order, y = delta_DDF, fill = Veg, pattern = AI_cat)
) +
  geom_hline(
    yintercept = c(-1, -0.5, 0.5, 1),
    linewidth = 0.6,
    color = "gray50",
    linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.8, color = "gray30") +
  ggpattern::geom_col_pattern(
    width = 0.85,
    color = "black",
    pattern_fill = "black",
    pattern_colour = "black",
    pattern_angle = 45,
    pattern_density = 0.25,
    pattern_spacing = 0.02,
    pattern_key_scale_factor = 0.6
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = veg_cols) +
  scale_pattern_manual(values = c("Arid" = "none", "Humid" = "stripe")) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = delta_site$site_order,
    labels = delta_site$sitename,
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.03))
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(-1.2, 1.2),
    breaks = seq(-1, 1, 0.5)
  ) +
  theme_ddf_facet +
  theme(
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1, size = 10, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(face = "bold", color = "black", size = 11),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(20, 10, 10, 10)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "LS ΔDDF (hours)"
  )

print(p_ls)

ggsave(
  file.path(output_dir, "BarPlots_DeltaDDF_by_Veg_and_AI_cat_LS.png"),
  p_ls,
  width = 12,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white",
  units = "in",
  device = ragg::agg_png
)

```

```{r Barplots_Veg_AI_MS, fig.cap= "Figure Delta DDF by Veg and sitename."}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,      # Hide code
  warning = FALSE,   # Hide warnings
  message = FALSE    # Optional: hide package loading messages
)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpattern)

theme_ddf_facet <- theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.4, color = "grey90"),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.3, color = "grey95"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

# 1) Prep
df_ms <- Daily %>%
  filter(!is.na(drought_cat), !is.na(DDF), !is.na(AI_cat), !is.na(Veg)) %>%
  filter(drought_cat %in% c("ND", "MS")) %>%
  mutate(
    drought_cat = factor(drought_cat, levels = c("ND", "MS")),
    Veg     = factor(Veg, levels = c("DBF", "ENF", "GRA", "SHR")),
    AI_cat  = factor(AI_cat, levels = c("Arid", "Humid"))
  )

# 2) One veg / AI_cat per site
site_veg <- df_ms %>%
  count(sitename, Veg, name = "n") %>%
  arrange(sitename, desc(n)) %>%
  group_by(sitename) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(sitename, Veg)

site_ai <- df_ms %>%
  count(sitename, AI_cat, name = "n") %>%
  arrange(sitename, desc(n)) %>%
  group_by(sitename) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(sitename, AI_cat)

# 3) Mean DDF per site × class, then delta
delta_site <- df_ms %>%
  group_by(sitename) %>%
  filter(all(c("ND", "MS") %in% drought_cat)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(sitename, drought_cat) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_DDF = mean(DDF, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_days   = n(),
    .groups  = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = drought_cat,
    values_from = c(mean_DDF, n_days)
  ) %>%
  mutate(delta_DDF = mean_DDF_MS - mean_DDF_ND) %>%
  left_join(site_veg, by = "sitename") %>%
  left_join(site_ai, by = "sitename") %>%
  filter(!is.na(delta_DDF), !is.na(Veg), !is.na(AI_cat)) %>%
  arrange(delta_DDF) %>%
  mutate(
    site_order = row_number(),
    sitename = factor(sitename, levels = sitename)
  )

veg_cols <- c(
  "DBF" = "#753bbd",
  "ENF" = "#2F80ED",
  "GRA" = "#2dc84d",
  "SHR" = "#ff7f41"
)

p_ms <- ggplot(
  delta_site,
  aes(x = site_order, y = delta_DDF, fill = Veg, pattern = AI_cat)
) +
  geom_hline(
    yintercept = c(-1, -0.5, 0.5, 1),
    linewidth = 0.6,
    color = "gray50",
    linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.8, color = "gray30") +
  ggpattern::geom_col_pattern(
    width = 0.85,
    color = "black",
    pattern_fill = "black",
    pattern_colour = "black",
    pattern_angle = 45,
    pattern_density = 0.25,
    pattern_spacing = 0.02,
    pattern_key_scale_factor = 0.6
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = veg_cols) +
  scale_pattern_manual(values = c("Arid" = "none", "Humid" = "stripe")) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = delta_site$site_order,
    labels = delta_site$sitename,
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.03))
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(-1.2, 1.2),
    breaks = seq(-1, 1, 0.5)
  ) +
  theme_ddf_facet +
  theme(
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1, size = 10, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(face = "bold", color = "black", size = 11),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(20, 10, 10, 10)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "MS ΔDDF (hours)"
  )

print(p_ms)

ggsave(
  file.path(output_dir, "BarPlots_DeltaDDF_by_Veg_and_AI_cat_MS.png"),
  p_ms,
  width = 12,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white",
  units = "in",
  device = ragg::agg_png
)

```



```{r Barplots_AI, fig.cap= "Figure Delta DDF  and sitename."}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,      # Hide code
  warning = FALSE,   # Hide warnings
  message = FALSE    # Optional: hide package loading messages
)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpattern)

theme_ddf_facet <- theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.4, color = "grey90"),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.3, color = "grey95"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

# 1) Prep
df <- Daily %>%
  filter(!is.na(Drought), !is.na(DDF), !is.na(AI_cat), !is.na(Veg), !is.na(mean_AI)) %>%
  mutate(
    Drought = factor(Drought, levels = c("ND", "Drought")),
    Veg     = factor(Veg, levels = c("DBF", "ENF", "GRA", "SHR")),
    AI_cat  = factor(AI_cat, levels = c("Arid", "Humid"))
  )

# 2) One veg / AI_cat / mean_AI per site
site_veg <- df %>%
  count(sitename, Veg, name = "n") %>%
  arrange(sitename, desc(n)) %>%
  group_by(sitename) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(sitename, Veg)

site_ai <- df %>%
  count(sitename, AI_cat, name = "n") %>%
  arrange(sitename, desc(n)) %>%
  group_by(sitename) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(sitename, AI_cat)

site_mean_ai <- df %>%
  group_by(sitename) %>%
  summarise(mean_AI = mean(mean_AI, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# 3) Mean DDF per site × class, then delta
delta_site <- df %>%
  group_by(sitename, Drought) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_DDF = mean(DDF, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_days   = n(),
    .groups  = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Drought,
    values_from = c(mean_DDF, n_days)
  ) %>%
  mutate(delta_DDF = mean_DDF_Drought - mean_DDF_ND) %>%
  left_join(site_veg, by = "sitename") %>%
  left_join(site_ai, by = "sitename") %>%
  left_join(site_mean_ai, by = "sitename") %>%
  filter(!is.na(delta_DDF), !is.na(Veg), !is.na(AI_cat), !is.na(mean_AI)) %>%
  #arrange(Veg, mean_AI) %>%
  arrange(delta_DDF) %>%
  mutate(
    site_order = row_number(),
    sitename = factor(sitename, levels = sitename)
  )

ai_cols <- c(
  "Arid" = "#E4572E",
  "Humid" = "#17BEBB"
)

p1 <- ggplot(
  delta_site,
  aes(x = site_order, y = delta_DDF, fill = AI_cat, pattern = AI_cat)
) +
  geom_hline(
    yintercept = c(-0.5, 0.5),
    linewidth = 0.6,
    color = "gray50",
    linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.8, color = "gray30") +
 geom_col(width = 0.85, color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = ai_cols) +
  scale_pattern_manual(values = c("Arid" = "none", "Humid" = "stripe")) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = delta_site$site_order,
    labels = delta_site$sitename,
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.03))
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    #limits = c(-1.2, 1.2),
    breaks = seq(-1, 1, 0.5)
  ) +
  theme_ddf_facet +
  theme(
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1, size = 10, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(face = "bold", color = "black", size = 11),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(20, 10, 10, 10)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "ΔDDF (hours)"
  )

print(p1)

ggsave(
  file.path(output_dir, "BarPlots_DeltaDDF_by_AI_cat.png"),
  p1,
  width = 12,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white",
  units = "in",
  device = ragg::agg_png
)

```

```{r Barplots_AI_LS, fig.cap= "Figure Delta DDF  and sitename."}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,      # Hide code
  warning = FALSE,   # Hide warnings
  message = FALSE    # Optional: hide package loading messages
)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpattern)

theme_ddf_facet <- theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.4, color = "grey90"),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.3, color = "grey95"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

# 1) Prep
df_ls <- Daily %>%
  filter(!is.na(drought_cat), !is.na(DDF), !is.na(AI_cat), !is.na(Veg)) %>%
  filter(drought_cat %in% c("ND", "LS")) %>%
  mutate(
    drought_cat = factor(drought_cat, levels = c("ND", "LS")),
    Veg     = factor(Veg, levels = c("DBF", "ENF", "GRA", "SHR")),
    AI_cat  = factor(AI_cat, levels = c("Arid", "Humid"))
  )

# 2) One veg / AI_cat per site
site_veg <- df_ls %>%
  count(sitename, Veg, name = "n") %>%
  arrange(sitename, desc(n)) %>%
  group_by(sitename) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(sitename, Veg)

site_ai <- df_ls %>%
  count(sitename, AI_cat, name = "n") %>%
  arrange(sitename, desc(n)) %>%
  group_by(sitename) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(sitename, AI_cat)

# 3) Mean DDF per site × class, then delta
delta_site <- df_ls %>%
  group_by(sitename) %>%
  filter(all(c("ND", "LS") %in% drought_cat)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(sitename, drought_cat) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_DDF = mean(DDF, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_days   = n(),
    .groups  = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = drought_cat,
    values_from = c(mean_DDF, n_days)
  ) %>%
  mutate(delta_DDF = mean_DDF_LS - mean_DDF_ND) %>%
  left_join(site_veg, by = "sitename") %>%
  left_join(site_ai, by = "sitename") %>%
  filter(!is.na(delta_DDF), !is.na(Veg), !is.na(AI_cat)) %>%
  arrange(delta_DDF) %>%
  mutate(
    site_order = row_number(),
    sitename = factor(sitename, levels = sitename)
  )

ai_cols <- c(
  "Arid" = "#E4572E",
  "Humid" = "#17BEBB"
)

p_ls <- ggplot(
  delta_site,
  aes(x = site_order, y = delta_DDF, fill = AI_cat, pattern = AI_cat)
) +
  geom_hline(
    yintercept = c(-1, -0.5, 0.5, 1),
    linewidth = 0.6,
    color = "gray50",
    linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.8, color = "gray30") +
 geom_col(width = 0.85, color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = ai_cols) +
  scale_pattern_manual(values = c("Arid" = "none", "Humid" = "stripe")) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = delta_site$site_order,
    labels = delta_site$sitename,
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.03))
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(-1.2, 1.2),
    breaks = seq(-1, 1, 0.5)
  ) +
  theme_ddf_facet +
  theme(
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1, size = 10, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(face = "bold", color = "black", size = 11),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(20, 10, 10, 10)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "LS ΔDDF (hours)"
  )

print(p_ls)

ggsave(
  file.path(output_dir, "BarPlots_DeltaDDF_by_AI_cat_LS.png"),
  p_ls,
  width = 12,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white",
  units = "in",
  device = ragg::agg_png
)

```

```{r Barplots_AI_MS, fig.cap= "Figure Delta DDF and sitename."}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,      # Hide code
  warning = FALSE,   # Hide warnings
  message = FALSE    # Optional: hide package loading messages
)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpattern)

theme_ddf_facet <- theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.4, color = "grey90"),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.3, color = "grey95"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

# 1) Prep
df_ms <- Daily %>%
  filter(!is.na(drought_cat), !is.na(DDF), !is.na(AI_cat), !is.na(Veg)) %>%
  filter(drought_cat %in% c("ND", "MS")) %>%
  mutate(
    drought_cat = factor(drought_cat, levels = c("ND", "MS")),
    Veg     = factor(Veg, levels = c("DBF", "ENF", "GRA", "SHR")),
    AI_cat  = factor(AI_cat, levels = c("Arid", "Humid"))
  )

# 2) One veg / AI_cat per site
site_veg <- df_ms %>%
  count(sitename, Veg, name = "n") %>%
  arrange(sitename, desc(n)) %>%
  group_by(sitename) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(sitename, Veg)

site_ai <- df_ms %>%
  count(sitename, AI_cat, name = "n") %>%
  arrange(sitename, desc(n)) %>%
  group_by(sitename) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(sitename, AI_cat)

# 3) Mean DDF per site × class, then delta
delta_site <- df_ms %>%
  group_by(sitename) %>%
  filter(all(c("ND", "MS") %in% drought_cat)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(sitename, drought_cat) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_DDF = mean(DDF, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_days   = n(),
    .groups  = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = drought_cat,
    values_from = c(mean_DDF, n_days)
  ) %>%
  mutate(delta_DDF = mean_DDF_MS - mean_DDF_ND) %>%
  left_join(site_veg, by = "sitename") %>%
  left_join(site_ai, by = "sitename") %>%
  filter(!is.na(delta_DDF), !is.na(Veg), !is.na(AI_cat)) %>%
  arrange(delta_DDF) %>%
  mutate(
    site_order = row_number(),
    sitename = factor(sitename, levels = sitename)
  )

ai_cols <- c(
  "Arid" = "#E4572E",
  "Humid" = "#17BEBB"
)

p_ms <- ggplot(
  delta_site,
  aes(x = site_order, y = delta_DDF, fill = AI_cat, pattern = AI_cat)
) +
  geom_hline(
    yintercept = c(-1, -0.5, 0.5, 1),
    linewidth = 0.6,
    color = "gray50",
    linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.8, color = "gray30") +
 geom_col(width = 0.85, color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = ai_cols) +
  scale_pattern_manual(values = c("Arid" = "none", "Humid" = "stripe")) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = delta_site$site_order,
    labels = delta_site$sitename,
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.03))
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(-1.2, 1.2),
    breaks = seq(-1, 1, 0.5)
  ) +
  theme_ddf_facet +
  theme(
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1, size = 10, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(face = "bold", color = "black", size = 11),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(20, 10, 10, 10)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "MS ΔDDF (hours)"
  )

print(p_ms)

ggsave(
  file.path(output_dir, "BarPlots_DeltaDDF_by_AI_cat_MS.png"),
  p_ms,
  width = 12,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white",
  units = "in",
  device = ragg::agg_png
)

```



# ```{r Barplots_AI_cat, fig.cap= "Figure Delta DDF by AI_cat and sitename."}
# 
# knitr::opts_chunk$set(
#   echo = FALSE,      # Hide code
#   warning = FALSE,   # Hide warnings
#   message = FALSE    # Optional: hide package loading messages
# )
# 
# 
# library(dplyr)
# library(tidyr)
# library(ggplot2)
# 
# #Organize from left to right based on mean_AI per sitename, versus AI_cat
# 
# theme_ddf_facet <- theme_classic() +
#   theme(
#     legend.position = "none",
#     axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8, color = "black"),
#     axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "black"),
#     axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold", color = "black"),
#     axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
#     #axis.text = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold", color = "black"),
#     axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "black"),
#     axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", color = "black"),
#     strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "black"),
#     panel.grid.major.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.4, color = "grey90"),
#     panel.grid.minor.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.3, color = "grey95"),
#     plot.title = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
#   )
# 
# 
# # 1) Prep
# df <- Daily %>%
#   filter(!is.na(Drought), !is.na(DDF), !is.na(AI_cat), !is.na(mean_AI)) %>%
#   mutate(
#     Drought = factor(Drought, levels = c("ND", "Drought")),
#     AI_cat  = factor(AI_cat, levels = c("Arid", "Humid"))
#   )
# 
# 
# # 2) One AI_cat per site (most common)
# site_ai <- df %>%
#   count(sitename, AI_cat, name = "n") %>%
#   arrange(sitename, desc(n)) %>%
#   group_by(sitename) %>%
#   slice(1) %>%
#   ungroup() %>%
#   dplyr::select(sitename, AI_cat)
# 
# # 3) One mean_AI per site
# site_mean_ai <- df %>%
#   group_by(sitename) %>%
#   summarise(mean_AI = mean(mean_AI, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
# 
# # 4) Mean DDF per site × drought class, then delta
# delta_site <- df %>%
#   group_by(sitename, Drought) %>%
#   summarise(
#     mean_DDF = mean(DDF, na.rm = TRUE),
#     n_days   = n(),
#     .groups  = "drop"
#   ) %>%
#   pivot_wider(
#     names_from = Drought,
#     values_from = c(mean_DDF, n_days)
#   ) %>%
#   mutate(delta_DDF = mean_DDF_Drought - mean_DDF_ND) %>%
#   left_join(site_ai, by = "sitename") %>%
#   left_join(site_mean_ai, by = "sitename") %>%
#   filter(!is.na(delta_DDF), !is.na(AI_cat), !is.na(mean_AI)) %>%
#   arrange(mean_AI) %>%   # <-- this is the key change
#   mutate(sitename = factor(sitename, levels = sitename))
# 
# 
# ai_cols <- c(
#   "Arid" = "#E4572E",
#   "Humid" = "#17BEBB"
# )
# 
# 
# # 5) Plot: ordered by AI_cat (trend-friendly)
# p1 <- ggplot(delta_site, aes(x = delta_DDF, y = sitename, fill = AI_cat)) +
#     
#   geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linewidth = 0.6, color = "gray50", linetype = "dashed")+
#   geom_vline(xintercept = 0.5, linewidth = 0.6, color = "gray50", linetype = "dashed")+
#   geom_vline(xintercept = -0.5, linewidth = 0.6, color = "gray50", linetype = "dashed")+
#   geom_vline(xintercept = -1, linewidth = 0.6, color = "gray50", linetype = "dashed")+
#   
#   geom_col(width = 0.85) +
#   coord_flip() +
#   scale_fill_manual(values = ai_cols)+
#   geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.8, color = "gray30")+
# 
#   theme_ddf_facet +
#   
#   theme(
#     axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8, color = "black"),
#     plot.title  = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "black", hjust = 0.5),
#     
#     axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
#     axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
#     
#     axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black",face = "bold"),# size = 14),
#     #axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11, color = "black"),
#     
#     axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5, size = 9, color = "black"),
#     
#     
#     legend.position = "bottom",
#     legend.text  = element_text(face = "bold", color = "black", size = 11),
#     legend.title = element_blank()
#   ) +
#   scale_x_continuous(
#   limits = c(-1.2, 1.2),
#   breaks = seq(-1, 1, 0.5)
# )+
#   
#   labs(
#     #title = "Delta DDF (Drought - ND; hours) by Site ordered by Aridity Class",
#     x = "ΔDDF (hours)",
#     y = element_blank()
#   )
# 
# print(p1)
# 
# 
# ggsave(
#   file.path(output_dir, "BarPlots_DeltaDDF_by_AI.png"),
#   p1,
#   width = 10,
#   height = 6,
#   dpi = 600,
#   bg = "white",
#   units = "in",
#   device = ragg::agg_png
# )
# 
# ```
# 
# ```{r Barplots_AI_cat_LS, fig.cap= "Figure Delta DDF by AI_cat and sitename."}
# 
# knitr::opts_chunk$set(
#   echo = FALSE,      # Hide code
#   warning = FALSE,   # Hide warnings
#   message = FALSE    # Optional: hide package loading messages
# )
# 
# library(dplyr)
# library(tidyr)
# library(ggplot2)
# 
# theme_ddf_facet <- theme_classic() +
#   theme(
#     legend.position = "none",
#     axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8, color = "black"),
#     axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "black"),
#     axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold", color = "black"),
#     axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
#     axis.text = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", color = "black"),
#     axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", color = "black"),
#     strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "black"),
#     panel.grid.major.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.4, color = "grey90"),
#     panel.grid.minor.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.3, color = "grey95"),
#     plot.title = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
#   )
# 
# # prep for LS vs ND
# df_ls <- df %>%
#   filter(drought_cat %in% c("LS", "ND")) %>%
#   mutate(
#     drought_cat = factor(drought_cat, levels = c("ND", "LS")),
#     AI_cat = factor(AI_cat, levels = c("Arid", "Humid"))
#   )
# 
# # one AI_cat per site
# site_ai <- df_ls %>%
#   count(sitename, AI_cat, name = "n") %>%
#   arrange(sitename, desc(n)) %>%
#   group_by(sitename) %>%
#   slice(1) %>%
#   ungroup() %>%
#   dplyr::select(sitename, AI_cat)
# 
# # one mean_AI per site
# site_mean_ai <- df_ls %>%
#   group_by(sitename) %>%
#   summarise(mean_AI = mean(mean_AI, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
# 
# # mean DDF per site x drought_cat, then delta
# delta_site <- df_ls %>%
#   group_by(sitename, drought_cat) %>%
#   summarise(
#     mean_DDF = mean(DDF, na.rm = TRUE),
#     n_days   = n(),
#     .groups  = "drop"
#   ) %>%
#   pivot_wider(
#     names_from = drought_cat,
#     values_from = c(mean_DDF, n_days)
#   ) %>%
#   mutate(delta_DDF = mean_DDF_LS - mean_DDF_ND) %>%
#   left_join(site_ai, by = "sitename") %>%
#   left_join(site_mean_ai, by = "sitename") %>%
#   filter(!is.na(delta_DDF), !is.na(AI_cat), !is.na(mean_AI)) %>%
#   arrange(mean_AI) %>%
#   mutate(sitename = factor(sitename, levels = sitename))
# 
# ai_cols <- c(
#   "Arid" = "#E4572E",
#   "Humid" = "#17BEBB"
# )
# 
# p1 <- ggplot(delta_site, aes(x = delta_DDF, y = sitename, fill = AI_cat)) +
#   geom_vline(
#     xintercept = c(-1, -0.5, 0.5, 1),
#     linewidth = 0.6,
#     color = "gray50",
#     linetype = "dashed"
#   ) +
#   geom_col(width = 0.85) +
#   coord_flip() +
#   scale_fill_manual(values = ai_cols) +
#   geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.8, color = "gray30") +
#   theme_ddf_facet +
#   theme(
#     axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8, color = "black"),
#     plot.title  = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "black", hjust = 0.5),
#     axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
#     axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
#     axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", face = "bold"),
#     axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5, size = 9, color = "black"),
#     legend.position = "bottom",
#     legend.text  = element_text(face = "bold", color = "black", size = 11),
#     legend.title = element_blank()
#   ) +
#   scale_x_continuous(
#     limits = c(-1.2, 1.2),
#     breaks = seq(-1, 1, 0.5)
#   ) +
#   labs(
#     x = "LS ΔDDF (hours)",
#     y = NULL
#   )
# 
# print(p1)
# 
# ggsave(
#   file.path(output_dir, "BarPlots_DeltaDDF_by_AI_LS.png"),
#   p1,
#   width = 10,
#   height = 6,
#   dpi = 600,
#   bg = "white",
#   units = "in",
#   device = ragg::agg_png
# )
# 
# ```
# 
# ```{r Barplots_AI_cat_MS, fig.cap= "Figure Delta DDF by AI_cat and sitename."}
# 
# knitr::opts_chunk$set(
#   echo = FALSE,      # Hide code
#   warning = FALSE,   # Hide warnings
#   message = FALSE    # Optional: hide package loading messages
# )
# 
# library(dplyr)
# library(tidyr)
# library(ggplot2)
# 
# theme_ddf_facet <- theme_classic() +
#   theme(
#     legend.position = "none",
#     axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8, color = "black"),
#     axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "black"),
#     axis.text.y = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold", color = "black"),
#     axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
#     axis.text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", color = "black"),
#     axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "black"),
#     strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "black"),
#     panel.grid.major.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.4, color = "grey90"),
#     panel.grid.minor.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.3, color = "grey95"),
#     plot.title = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
#   )
# 
# df_ms <- df %>%
#   filter(drought_cat %in% c("MS", "ND")) %>%
#   mutate(
#     drought_cat = factor(drought_cat, levels = c("ND", "MS")),
#     AI_cat = factor(AI_cat, levels = c("Arid", "Humid"))
#   )
# 
# # one AI_cat per site
# site_ai <- df_ms %>%
#   count(sitename, AI_cat, name = "n") %>%
#   arrange(sitename, desc(n)) %>%
#   group_by(sitename) %>%
#   slice(1) %>%
#   ungroup() %>%
#   dplyr::select(sitename, AI_cat)
# 
# # one mean_AI per site
# site_mean_ai <- df_ms %>%
#   group_by(sitename) %>%
#   summarise(mean_AI = mean(mean_AI, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
# 
# # site-level delta
# delta_site <- df_ms %>%
#   filter(drought_cat %in% c("ND", "MS")) %>%
#   group_by(sitename) %>%
#   filter(all(c("ND", "MS") %in% drought_cat)) %>%
#   ungroup() %>%
#   group_by(sitename, drought_cat) %>%
#   summarise(
#     mean_DDF = mean(DDF, na.rm = TRUE),
#     n_days   = n(),
#     .groups  = "drop"
#   ) %>%
#   pivot_wider(
#     names_from  = drought_cat,
#     values_from = c(mean_DDF, n_days)
#   ) %>%
#   mutate(delta_DDF = mean_DDF_MS - mean_DDF_ND) %>%
#   left_join(site_ai, by = "sitename") %>%
#   left_join(site_mean_ai, by = "sitename") %>%
#   filter(!is.na(delta_DDF), !is.na(AI_cat), !is.na(mean_AI)) %>%
#   arrange(mean_AI) %>%
#   mutate(sitename = factor(sitename, levels = sitename))
# 
# ai_cols <- c(
#   "Arid" = "#E4572E",
#   "Humid" = "#17BEBB"
# )
# 
# p1 <- ggplot(delta_site, aes(x = delta_DDF, y = sitename, fill = AI_cat)) +
#   geom_vline(
#     xintercept = c(-1, -0.5, 0.5, 1),
#     linewidth = 0.6,
#     color = "gray50",
#     linetype = "dashed"
#   ) +
#   geom_col(width = 0.85) +
#   coord_flip() +
#   scale_fill_manual(values = ai_cols) +
#   geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.8, color = "gray30") +
#   theme_ddf_facet +
#   theme(
#     axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8, color = "black"),
#     plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "black", hjust = 0.5),
#     axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
#     axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
#     axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", face = "bold"),
#     axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5, size = 9, color = "black"),
#     legend.position = "bottom",
#     legend.text = element_text(face = "bold", color = "black", size = 11),
#     legend.title = element_blank()
#   ) +
#   scale_x_continuous(
#     limits = c(-1.2, 1.2),
#     breaks = seq(-1, 1, 0.5)
#   ) +
#   labs(
#     x = "MS ΔDDF (hours)",
#     y = NULL
#   )
# 
# print(p1)
# 
# ggsave(
#   file.path(output_dir, "BarPlots_DeltaDDF_by_AI_MS.png"),
#   p1,
#   width = 4,
#   height = 6,
#   dpi = 600,
#   bg = "white",
#   units = "in",
#   device = ragg::agg_png
# )
# 
# ```
#
